---
title: "Exploring Datasets"
author: "Emma McEvoy"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(deSolve)
library(incidence)
library(EpiEstim)
```

```{r noro}
noro <- outbreaks::norovirus_derbyshire_2001_school
noro
```

```{r ebola}
ebola <- outbreaks::ebola_sim
ebola
```

```{r covid}
covid <- outbreaks::covid19_england_nhscalls_2020
covid
```

#How did covid 19 cases vary overtime by age

https://digital.nhs.uk/data-and-information/publications/statistical/mi-potential-covid-19-symptoms-reported-through-nhs-pathways-and-111-online/latest -can i use this updated data set?
```{r incidence, echo = FALSE}
i <- covid$date %>% incidence()
i
```
```{r serial}
s_interval <- make_config(
  mean_si = 5.59,
  std_si = 4.15
)
```
```{r serial}
my_R <- estimate_R(i, method= "parametric_si", config = s_interval)
plot(my_R)
my_R$R
```
